title: Trading bot
author: DonZDK
selftext:
Anyone need a stabil passive income,
0.4-2.0% daily profit. Minimum 50$ depo. 
Ill give you 1% cashback for every depo you make.
Pm me for info 
#trading

replies.author: DonZDK
replies.body:
Hello there, sorry for the late answer😅 
It's a bot that trades daily for me. It makes 0.4-2% daily with 50-950invested. There are different packages to invest in. We got a huge community on telegram and whatsapp. 

Feel free to pm me for more. 
Otherwise here is my link:
